channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 15A: Harmful car
item.description: Operation only between station Meidling S U, Schedifkaplatz and Swatoschgasse. expected duration: 17:30 watch. Reason: Harmful car in the area Grillgasse. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between station Meidling S U, Schedifkaplatz and Swatoschgasse. expected duration: 17:30 watch. Reason: Harmful car in the area Grillgasse.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 6: defective vehicle
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: O: service disruption
item.description: service obstruction towards Raxstraße. expected duration: 17:30 watch. Reason: service disruption in the Sechskrügelgasse stop area. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction towards Raxstraße. expected duration: 17:30 watch. Reason: service disruption in the Sechskrügelgasse stop area.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 66A: service obstruction for rescue operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 86A/87A: Wiedgasse
item.description: Stop transfer of lines 86A towards Breitenlee, Arnikaweg and 87A towards Hermann-Gebauer-Straße Stop: Wiedgasse From: Wiedgasse before Konstanziagasse … [Since 07.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop transfer of lines 86A towards Breitenlee, Arnikaweg and 87A towards Hermann-Gebauer-Straße Stop: Wiedgasse From: Wiedgasse before Konstanziagasse …
[Since 07.05.2026]

item.title: 10A/39A: Barawitzkagasse
item.description: Stop change of lines 10A and 39A towards station Heiligenstadt S U Stop: Barawitzkagasse From: Barawitzkagasse 4-6 To: Barawitzkagasse 10-12 Duration: From … [Since 05.05.2026]

item.title: 16A/62: lock Hetzendorf
item.description: Transfer of the lines 62 and 16A to the Opera, Karlsplatz U or Alaudagasse U Stop: Hetzendorf Castle From: Hetzendorfer Straße 79 To: Hetzendorfer … [Since 04.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Transfer of the lines 62 and 16A to the Opera, Karlsplatz U or Alaudagasse U Stop: Hetzendorf Castle From: Hetzendorfer Straße 79 To: Hetzendorfer …
[Since 04.05.2026]

item.title: N81: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works on the Olympiaplatz, the N81 call bus line is redirected. [05.05.2026 – 06.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works on the Olympiaplatz, the N81 call bus line is redirected.
[05.05.2026 – 06.06.2026]

item.title: 43: track construction works
item.description: Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße, the following change is made to the 43 line. [Since 20.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße, the following change is made to the 43 line.
[Since 20.04.2026]

item.title: 7A: Antonsplatz
item.description: Stop change of line 7A towards Reumannplatz U Stop: Antonsplatz From: Antonsplatz 13 before Rechberggasse To: Antonsplatz 16 Duration: 22 April 2026, about … [Since 16.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
